event_headline: Polish Border Guards Raiding Human Smugglers
topic: Immigration Policy: Open Borders vs. National Control and Cultural Preservation

chronology.action: reported on a large protest in London against 'mass migration'
posted stating they should return to their homeland, implying the UK is not welcoming

key_actors.name: BorderPatrolUSA
key_actors.stated_position: defended secure borders and national security

factual_claims.claim: Polish Border Guards conducting raids against human smugglers bringing illegal migrants into Europe

disputed_claims.claim: 'mass migration' is a direct threat to national security and cultural preservation
disputed_claims.competing_accounts: some argue it's an unfounded claim meant to foster fear

competing_frames.proponents: border protection advocates like BorderHawk and TheLiberal_ie
competing_frames.summary: frames migration as a threat requiring secure borders to preserve national interest

competing_frames.proponents: advocates like OSG (OpenSocieties) reporting on the importance of open policies
competing_frames.summary: frames migration through humanitarian lens, arguing for inclusive and compassionate policies under global solidarity
